name: @davidlevyelias/luapack
author: David Levy Elias
description: A modern Lua bundler and analyzer.

scripts.example:simple:bundle: npm run build && node build/index.js bundle --config examples/simple/basic.luapack.config.json
scripts.example:simple:analyze: npm run build && node build/index.js analyze --config examples/simple/basic.luapack.config.json --verbose
scripts.example:simple:missing: npm run build && node build/index.js analyze --config examples/simple/missing-warn.luapack.config.json --verbose
scripts.example:demo:bundle: npm run build && node build/index.js bundle --config examples/demo/basic.luapack.config.json
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
